rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies a real, verifiable naming inconsistency: `Deck.smul_eq_apply` and `TauCeti.Homeomorph.smul_def` are parallel unfolding lemmas in the same PR but use different names, with `smul_def` matching Mathlib convention and `smul_eq_apply` having no precedent. Renaming to `smul_def` genuinely improves consistency; Review 1 misses this.
